summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control dashboard iteration 2. All requested features working correctly including enhanced model selector with cost tier badges and capability icons, full Dashboard/Jobs/Approvals pages functionality, Cowork and Code features integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button occasionally intercepted by overlay element (Emergent badge)
ui_bugs.workaround: Using force=True in clicks resolves the issue

passed_tests: Model selector shows providers list with model counts (9 providers found)
Model selector shows cost tier badges (Free, $, $$, $$$) - 3 badges found
Model selector shows capability icons (👁️ Vision, 💻 Coding, 🔧 Tool Call, 📁 Files, 🧠 Reasoning, ⚡ Fast) - 30 icons found
Capability icons are green when supported, gray when not supported
Dashboard page shows stats: Active Jobs, Pending Approvals, Connectors count, Gateway status (21 stats elements)
Dashboard shows Active Model section
Dashboard shows Recent Events section
Jobs page shows job cards with status (Running/Completed/Pending) - 17 status indicators found
Jobs page shows progress bars for running jobs (2 progress bars found)
Jobs page has New Job button
Approvals page shows pending approvals with Approve/Reject buttons (2 of each found)
Approvals page shows risk levels (low/medium/high) with color coding (8 risk indicators)
Approvals can be approved/rejected (state changes) - tested successfully
Spaces page shows workspace cards with agents (Development, Research, Automation)
Spaces page has New Space button
Cowork page shows participants (Meg, OpenClaw) with status indicators
Cowork has chat interface for collaboration
Code page shows terminal interface
Terminal accepts commands and shows output (pwd, ls commands tested)
Terminal Clear button works correctly
Settings page shows connectors toggles (functional)
Settings page shows writing style selection (4 styles: Normal, Concise, Formal, Explanatory)
Top tabs (Chat/Cowork/Code) navigate correctly
Model selection and switching works correctly
Plus menu with Skills submenu functional
Feature cards clickable and functional (4 cards found)
All navigation items work correctly (Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings)
Binary rain background effect renders correctly
Connection status shows 'Scheduled' with green indicator
Zustand state management working properly for all features
success_percentage: frontend: 98% (minor overlay issue in Cowork chat)
